title: SWORD Escapes Pirate Island
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Kuzan, Blackbeard, Unknown person #8, Garp, Unknown person #9 as Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.
scene: Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Where do you think you're going...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And here I was just being worried about you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: about what happens to your ship?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is it! The arm has lifted!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I will answer to your expect-ations!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You bastard!! Don't think I'll give up with this, GARP!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Koby has improved very quickly but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He seems to have a lot of wounds. He always wraps bandages around his hands.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look closely to what I'm about to do!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me, he's going to stop that hand?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyahaha! Being called a "hero" got to his head, that damn brat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His hands and shoulders are full of them...

summary: This part advances the Garp’s Last Stand at Hachinosu through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
